title: ClearMap reasoning output
description: Shape of the reasoning.json an agent (or an OpenAI-compatible provider) writes for merge_reasoning.py. Runtime validation in ClearMap is stdlib-only; this schema documents and tests the contract. Category, hipaa_ref, and authority_type are taken from references/taxonomy.json at merge time, not trusted from this input.

manifest.description: Completion manifest. The assessment is marked Complete only when it reports no failed batches, no truncation, no skipped files, and a scan_fingerprint matching the deterministic scan.

scan_fingerprint.description: Copy of findings-deterministic.json scan.fingerprint; binds this review to that scan/revision

files_skipped.description: Applicable files NOT reviewed; must be empty for Complete

size_skipped.description: Applicable files skipped only because they exceed the size limit; a subset of files_skipped

truncated.description: True if the review did not cover the whole codebase

id.description: A canonical reasoning-layer id from taxonomy.json

structural_snippet.description: Structure only; never a raw PHI or secret value

severity_override_reason.description: Required to RAISE severity above the canonical value; a lower severity is clamped up to canonical at merge time

hipaa_ref.description: Ignored; taken from taxonomy.json at merge time

authority_type.description: Ignored; taken from taxonomy.json at merge time

engine.description: Ignored; set to the provider at merge time
